transport.request_encoding: Examples use application/x-www-form-urlencoded query/body parameters; SDK should support query encoding for GET and form body for POST.

auth.redaction_rule: Never log, print, persist, or include real API keys in docs/fixtures/errors; redact key values in URLs, bodies, traces, and test failures.

safety_boundary.documented_boundary: Gingr public API requests are HTTPS JSON and all endpoints are documented as read-only.
safety_boundary.sdk_boundary: Expose only read/query builders. Do not expose operational writes, customer-facing actions, check-in/check-out commands, phone-call notifications, or payment actions as agent-executable operations.

excluded_from_read_only_sdk_v0.name: quick_checkin
excluded_from_read_only_sdk_v0.reason: Side effects: checks in pets, creates a reservation if one does not exist, and checks it in.

excluded_from_read_only_sdk_v0.name: receive_call
excluded_from_read_only_sdk_v0.reason: Side effects: triggers in-app alert and records an incoming phone call.

safety_boundary.no_live_calls: This catalog was produced from local/public docs only; no live Gingr calls or real keys were used.

endpoints.name: reservations
endpoints.purpose: Retrieve reservations within a date range or all currently checked-in reservations.
date_or_range_constraints: start_date/end_date are required only when checked_in=false and disregarded when checked_in=true
endpoints.location_scoping_caveats: Optional location_id restricts to a location in the app.
endpoints.response_shape_notes: Returns matching reservation records in Gingr JSON envelope/array form; exact schema not fully documented.
sdk_notes: Treat POST as read-only per API docs; encode as form body.

endpoints.name: reservation_widget_data
endpoints.purpose: Retrieve dashboard-widget reservation summary for a date, including counts of check-ins, check-outs, and overnights.
date_or_range_constraints: timestamp is a date in YYYY-MM-DD format
endpoints.response_shape_notes: Summary counts used by the top-center Gingr Dashboard widget.

endpoints.name: reservations_by_animal
endpoints.purpose: Retrieve reservations for a given animal.
endpoints.pagination: params[limit] limits records returned; no offset/page documented
endpoints.location_scoping_caveats: Only pulls reservation data for the location the API user is currently logged into; reservations in other locations do not appear.
endpoints.response_shape_notes: HTTPS JSON object; endpoint-specific shape not documented in source article.

endpoints.name: reservations_by_owner
endpoints.purpose: Retrieve reservations for a given owner.
endpoints.pagination: params[limit] limits records returned; no offset/page documented
endpoints.location_scoping_caveats: Only pulls reservation data for the location the API user is currently logged into; reservations in other locations do not appear.
endpoints.response_shape_notes: HTTPS JSON object; endpoint-specific shape not documented in source article.

endpoints.name: reservation_types
endpoints.purpose: Retrieve reservation types.
endpoints.response_shape_notes: HTTPS JSON object; endpoint-specific shape not documented in source article.

endpoints.name: get_services_by_type
endpoints.purpose: Retrieve allowable additional services for a reservation type.
endpoints.location_scoping_caveats: Optional location_id restricts to a location; docs say probably 1 for single-location apps.
endpoints.response_shape_notes: HTTPS JSON object; endpoint-specific shape not documented in source article.

endpoints.name: existing_reservation_estimate
endpoints.purpose: Retrieve estimated cost for a future reservation.
endpoints.response_shape_notes: Estimated cost data for one future reservation; exact fields not documented.

endpoints.name: recently_cancelled_reservations
endpoints.purpose: Retrieve reservations cancelled within a date range.
endpoints.location_scoping_caveats: If location_id is set, filters down to owners of the specified home location.
endpoints.response_shape_notes: HTTPS JSON object; endpoint-specific shape not documented in source article.

endpoints.name: back_of_house
endpoints.purpose: Retrieve data used to power Gingr's Digital Whiteboard.
date_or_range_constraints: mins_future restricts to next/last X minutes
full_day ignores mins_future and includes all reservations checking in/out today
endpoints.response_shape_notes: JSON envelope with success/error and data.checking_in/data.checking_out arrays; example fields include reservation, owner, animal, type, timestamps, run/area, belonging counts, status, event_time.

endpoints.name: authorize_owner
endpoints.purpose: Authorize that an owner account exists and the provided password matches Gingr's record.
endpoints.response_shape_notes: Authorization result; exact schema not documented.
sdk_notes: Sensitive credential verification endpoint: keep out of normal data-ingestion flows unless explicitly reviewed.

endpoints.name: new_modified_owners
endpoints.purpose: Retrieve customers created or modified within a date range.
endpoints.location_scoping_caveats: If location_id is set, filters down to owners of the specified home location.
endpoints.response_shape_notes: HTTPS JSON object; endpoint-specific shape not documented in source article.

endpoints.name: forms_get_form
endpoints.purpose: Return a form data structure for a type of record.
endpoints.response_shape_notes: Form data structure; article does not state key requirement for this endpoint, unlike most /api/v1 endpoints.

endpoints.name: owner
endpoints.purpose: Retrieve a specific owner record.
endpoints.response_shape_notes: Owner record; source lists id as both required and optional, so SDK should require at least one lookup discriminator.
sdk_notes: Normalize builder as one-of owner id, animal id, reservation id, phone, or email.

endpoints.name: owners
endpoints.purpose: Retrieve a list of owners.
endpoints.response_shape_notes: Owner list; example filters by params[zip]=80302.
sdk_notes: Where-clause filter names are provider-specific and should remain quarantined/raw unless typed later.

endpoints.name: animals
endpoints.purpose: Retrieve a list of animals.
endpoints.response_shape_notes: Animal list; example filters by MySQL expression params[month(from_unixtime(birthday))]=11.
sdk_notes: Avoid exposing arbitrary SQL-like filter strings to agent policy decisions without allowlisting.

endpoints.name: custom_field_search
endpoints.purpose: Retrieve custom field information for an owner or animal.
endpoints.response_shape_notes: JSON envelope {success,error,data:[...]} with owner/animal-like rows; example includes PII and password-like fields, so response logging must be redacted/quarantined.
sdk_notes: High-PII response; never log raw data.

endpoints.name: get_feeding_info
endpoints.purpose: Retrieve an animal's feeding information.
endpoints.response_shape_notes: Animal feeding information; exact fields not documented.

endpoints.name: get_medication_info
endpoints.purpose: Retrieve an animal's medication information.
endpoints.response_shape_notes: Animal medication information; exact fields not documented.

endpoints.name: get_locations
endpoints.purpose: Retrieve locations for this app.
endpoints.response_shape_notes: Location list; exact fields not documented.

endpoints.name: get_species
endpoints.purpose: Retrieve species for this app.
endpoints.response_shape_notes: HTTPS JSON object; endpoint-specific shape not documented in source article.

endpoints.name: get_breeds
endpoints.purpose: Retrieve breeds for this app.
endpoints.response_shape_notes: HTTPS JSON object; endpoint-specific shape not documented in source article.

endpoints.name: get_vets
endpoints.purpose: Retrieve vet names for this app.

optional_params.name: vetFlag
optional_params.type: boolean; true returns all vet information

endpoints.response_shape_notes: Vet names by default; all vet information when vetFlag=true.

endpoints.name: get_temperaments
endpoints.purpose: Retrieve temperaments for this app.
endpoints.response_shape_notes: HTTPS JSON object; endpoint-specific shape not documented in source article.

endpoints.name: get_immunization_types
endpoints.purpose: Retrieve immunization types for a species.
endpoints.response_shape_notes: HTTPS JSON object; endpoint-specific shape not documented in source article.

endpoints.name: get_animal_immunizations
endpoints.purpose: Retrieve immunization records for an animal.
endpoints.response_shape_notes: Animal immunization records; exact fields not documented.

endpoints.name: get_all_retail_items
endpoints.purpose: Retrieve all retail items for sale.
endpoints.response_shape_notes: HTTPS JSON object; endpoint-specific shape not documented in source article.

endpoints.name: list_transactions
endpoints.purpose: Retrieve POS transactions.
endpoints.response_shape_notes: Transaction list; exact fields not documented.

endpoints.name: list_invoices
endpoints.purpose: Retrieve invoices/estimates created on or after 2019-08-01.

optional_params.name: complete
optional_params.type: boolean; true invoices, false estimates; default false

optional_params.name: closed_only
optional_params.type: boolean; true closed only, false open and closed; default false

endpoints.pagination: per_page and page must be used together; page is the starting result number and increments by per_page (per_page=10 => page=1, 11, 21...).
endpoints.response_shape_notes: Invoice/estimate list; exact fields not documented.

endpoints.name: transaction
endpoints.purpose: Retrieve a transaction and payment details.
endpoints.response_shape_notes: Transaction and payment details; likely payment-sensitive, exact fields not documented.
sdk_notes: Treat response as payment-sensitive and redact/quarantine raw payloads.

endpoints.name: get_subscription
endpoints.purpose: Retrieve one subscription by ID.
endpoints.response_shape_notes: HTTPS JSON object; endpoint-specific shape not documented in source article.

endpoints.name: get_subscriptions
endpoints.purpose: Retrieve subscriptions.
endpoints.pagination: limit and offset can be used together to paginate.
endpoints.location_scoping_caveats: location_id limits to a specific location; owner_id limits to subscriptions of that owner.
endpoints.response_shape_notes: HTTPS JSON object; endpoint-specific shape not documented in source article.

endpoints.name: timeclock_report
endpoints.purpose: Retrieve timeclock records.
endpoints.response_shape_notes: Timeclock record list; exact fields not documented.

endpoints.name: report_card_files
endpoints.purpose: Retrieve recently uploaded report card files.
endpoints.pagination: limit caps records returned; no offset/page documented
endpoints.location_scoping_caveats: Optional location_id restricts to a location.
endpoints.response_shape_notes: Report card file records; exact fields not documented.
